Package jline.lang

Class NetworkEvent

  • java.lang.Object
    • jline.lang.NetworkEvent
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    Serializable
    public class NetworkEvent
extends Object
implements Serializable
    Class abstracting an event within a Network model
    See Also:
